case_title: FRANCISCO, CELIA vs. MRS. J. CARLENE ASBURY et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION RE: LOST/UNAVAILABLE DOCUMENT LEASE FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO, CELIA
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $10.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO, CELIA
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT MRS. J. CARLENE ASBURY

REQUEST TO ENTER DEFAULT FILED/DEFAULT ENTERED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS, COST BILL $100.00 FILED, CREDIT ACKNOWLEDGED $.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO, CELIA AS TO DEFENDANT MRS. J. CARLENE ASBURY
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO, CELIA SERVED DEC-07-1995, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT MRS. J. CARLENE ASBURY
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO, CELIA AS TO DEFENDANT MRS. J. CARLENE ASBURY DOES 1-10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FRANCISCO, CELIA RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MRS. J. CARLENE ASBURY THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 805 LEAVENWORTH ST #305, LEASE FORFEITED
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT MRS. J. CARLENE ASBURY
